---
title: "12_Diablo2_omics_integration"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
# ---- packages ----
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(limma)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)
library(vegan)
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(purrr)
library(haven)
library(ggVennDiagram)
library(caret)
library(jsonlite)
library(mixOmics)
```

```{r}
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "leidholt") {
  root_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/"
  git_path  <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/CHCO-Code/"
  keys      <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/leidholt/keys.json")
} else if (user == "sleidholt") {
  root_path <- "/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
  dir.results <- file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results")
  git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
} else if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
  root_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
  dir.results <- file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results")
  git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}
```

```{r}
limma_prot <- readRDS(file.path(
  root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data",
  "limma_gsea_inputs_age_sex_study.rds"
))
prot_out  <- limma_prot$all_omics$out
prot_log <- readRDS(file = file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data", "proteomics_paired_matrix.rds"))



limma_metab <- readRDS(file.path(
  root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data",
  "limma_metabolomics_inputs_age_sex_study.rds"
))
metab_out <- limma_metab$all_omics$out
metab_log <- readRDS(file = file.path(root_path,"Savanah Leidholt","TRIAD","Data","metabolomics_paired_matrix.rds"))



meta_paired<- readRDS(file = file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data", "paired_metadata.rds"))
```
#----------------------------
#function for top 50 features
#---------------------------
```{r}
get_top_abs_t <- function(out_list, contrast_name, n = 50) {
  out_list[[contrast_name]] %>%
    dplyr::mutate(abs_t = abs(t)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs_t)) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n) %>%
    dplyr::pull(feature_id)
}
```

```{r}
top_prot_t1d_lc <- get_top_abs_t(prot_out,  "T1D_vs_T2D", n = 50)
top_metab_t1d_lc <- get_top_abs_t(metab_out, "T1D_vs_T2D", n = 50)
```

```{r}
X_prot <- prot_log[, top_prot_t1d_lc, drop = FALSE]
X_metab <- metab_log[, top_metab_t1d_lc, drop = FALSE]
```

```{r}
contrast_name <- "T1D_vs_T2D"

groups_keep <- c("T2D", "T1D")

meta_diablo <- meta_paired %>%
  filter(group4 %in% groups_keep) %>%
  mutate(group4 = factor(group4, levels = groups_keep))
```

```{r}
common_ids <- Reduce(
  intersect,
  list(
    rownames(meta_diablo),
    rownames(X_prot),
    rownames(X_metab)
  )
)

meta_diablo <- meta_diablo[common_ids, , drop = FALSE]
X_prot_d   <- X_prot[common_ids, , drop = FALSE]
X_metab_d  <- X_metab[common_ids, , drop = FALSE]

Y <- droplevels(meta_diablo$group4)

table(Y)
dim(X_prot_d)
dim(X_metab_d)
```
#----------------------------
# remove bad features
#----------------------------
```{r}
clean_block <- function(x) {
  x <- as.matrix(x)
  x <- x[, colSums(is.na(x)) == 0, drop = FALSE]
  x <- x[, apply(x, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) > 0, drop = FALSE]
  x
}

X_prot_d  <- clean_block(X_prot_d)
X_metab_d <- clean_block(X_metab_d)

X <- list(
  proteomics   = X_prot_d,
  metabolomics = X_metab_d
)
```
#----------------------------
# design matrix
# 0.1 = weak connection
# 0.5 = moderate connection
# 1 = force strong integration
#----------------------------
```{r}
design <- matrix(
  0.1,
  ncol = length(X),
  nrow = length(X),
  dimnames = list(names(X), names(X))
)

diag(design) <- 0
design
```

```{r}
set.seed(1835)

diablo_init <- block.splsda(
  X = X,
  Y = Y,
  ncomp = 2,
  design = design
)

plotIndiv(
  diablo_init,
  comp = c(1, 2),
  group = Y,
  legend = TRUE,
  title = paste0("DIABLO: ", contrast_name)
)
```
```{r}
set.seed(1835)

test_keepX <- list(
  proteomics   = c(5, 10, 15, 25, 50),
  metabolomics = c(5, 10, 15, 25, 50)
)

tune_diablo <- tune.block.splsda(
  X = X,
  Y = Y,
  ncomp = 2,
  test.keepX = test_keepX,
  design = design,
  validation = "Mfold",
  folds = 5,
  nrepeat = 50,
  dist = "centroids.dist",
  progressBar = TRUE
)

tune_diablo$choice.keepX
tune_diablo$choice.ncomp
```

```{r}
final_ncomp <- tune_diablo$choice.ncomp$ncomp

final_keepX <- lapply(
  tune_diablo$choice.keepX,
  function(x) x[seq_len(final_ncomp)]
)

final_keepX


diablo_final <- block.splsda(
  X = X,
  Y = Y,
  ncomp = final_ncomp,
  keepX = final_keepX,
  design = design
)

diablo_final
```
#----------------------------
# model performance
#----------------------------
```{r}
set.seed(123)

perf_diablo <- perf(
  diablo_final,
  validation = "Mfold",
  folds = 5,
  nrepeat = 50,
  dist = "centroids.dist",
  progressBar = TRUE
)

perf_diablo$error.rate
perf_diablo$auc
```
```{r}
#plotIndiv(
#  diablo_final,
#  comp = c(1),
#  group = Y,
#  legend = TRUE,
#  title = paste0("Final DIABLO: ", contrast_name)
#)

plotLoadings(
  diablo_final,
  block = "proteomics",
  comp = 1,
  contrib = "max",
  method = "mean"
)

plotLoadings(
  diablo_final,
  block = "metabolomics",
  comp = 1,
  contrib = "max",
  method = "mean"
)

circosPlot(
  diablo_final,
  cutoff = 0.7,
  line = TRUE,
  size.labels = 0.7
)
```

```{r}
pdf(
  file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results", "Integrated",
            paste0("network_", contrast_name, ".pdf")),
  width = 12,
  height = 10
)

network(
  diablo_final,
  cutoff = 0.7,
  color.node = c("lightblue", "mistyrose")
)

dev.off()
```
```{r}
quartz(width = 10, height = 8)

network(
  diablo_final,
  cutoff = 0.7,
  color.node = c("lightblue", "mistyrose")
)
```
```{r}
contrast_groups <- list(
  T1D_vs_LC  = c("LC", "T1D"),
  T2D_vs_LC  = c("LC", "T2D"),
  T1D_vs_T2D = c("T2D", "T1D"),
  OC_vs_LC   = c("LC", "OC"),
  T1D_vs_OC  = c("OC", "T1D"),
  T2D_vs_OC  = c("OC", "T2D")
)

diablo_dir <- file.path(
  root_path,
  "Savanah Leidholt",
  "TRIAD",
  "Results",
  "Integrated",
  "DIABLO"
)
```

#----------------------------
# run DIABLO per contrast
#----------------------------
```{r}
run_diablo_contrast <- function(
    contrast_name,
    groups_keep,
    prot_out,
    metab_out,
    prot_log,
    metab_log,
    meta_paired,
    top_n = 50,
    ncomp_tune = 2,
    folds = 5,
    nrepeat = 50,
    cutoff = 0.7,
    out_dir = diablo_dir
) {
  
  message("Running DIABLO for: ", contrast_name)
  

  top_prot <- get_top_abs_t(prot_out, contrast_name, n = top_n)
  top_metab <- get_top_abs_t(metab_out, contrast_name, n = top_n)
  
  top_prot <- intersect(top_prot, colnames(prot_log))
  top_metab <- intersect(top_metab, colnames(metab_log))
  
  X_prot <- prot_log[, top_prot, drop = FALSE]
  X_metab <- metab_log[, top_metab, drop = FALSE]
  

  #subset metadata
  meta_diablo <- meta_paired %>%
    dplyr::filter(group4 %in% groups_keep) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(group4 = factor(group4, levels = groups_keep))
  
  common_ids <- Reduce(
    intersect,
    list(
      rownames(meta_diablo),
      rownames(X_prot),
      rownames(X_metab)
    )
  )
  
  meta_diablo <- meta_diablo[common_ids, , drop = FALSE]
  X_prot_d <- X_prot[common_ids, , drop = FALSE]
  X_metab_d <- X_metab[common_ids, , drop = FALSE]
  
  Y <- droplevels(meta_diablo$group4)
  
  # skip weak contrasts
  if (length(unique(Y)) < 2 || min(table(Y)) < folds) {
    warning("Skipping ", contrast_name, ": not enough samples per group.")
    return(NULL)
  }
  

  #cleaning
  X_prot_d <- clean_block(X_prot_d)
  X_metab_d <- clean_block(X_metab_d)
  
  X <- list(
    proteomics = X_prot_d,
    metabolomics = X_metab_d
  )

  design <- matrix(
    0.1,
    ncol = length(X),
    nrow = length(X),
    dimnames = list(names(X), names(X))
  )
  diag(design) <- 0
  

  #model tuning
  test_keepX <- list(
    proteomics = c(5, 10, 15, 25, 50),
    metabolomics = c(5, 10, 15, 25, 50)
  )
  
  set.seed(123)
  
  tune_diablo <- tune.block.splsda(
    X = X,
    Y = Y,
    ncomp = ncomp_tune,
    test.keepX = test_keepX,
    design = design,
    validation = "Mfold",
    folds = folds,
    nrepeat = nrepeat,
    dist = "centroids.dist",
    progressBar = TRUE
  )
  
  final_ncomp <- tune_diablo$choice.ncomp$ncomp
  
  final_keepX <- lapply(
    tune_diablo$choice.keepX,
    function(x) x[seq_len(final_ncomp)]
  )
  

  # final model
  diablo_final <- block.splsda(
    X = X,
    Y = Y,
    ncomp = final_ncomp,
    keepX = final_keepX,
    design = design
  )
  
  set.seed(123)
  
  perf_diablo <- perf(
    diablo_final,
    validation = "Mfold",
    folds = folds,
    nrepeat = nrepeat,
    dist = "centroids.dist",
    progressBar = TRUE
  )
  
selected <- selectVar(diablo_final, comp = 1)

selected_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  tibble(
    contrast = contrast_name,
    block = "proteomics",
    feature_id = selected$proteomics$name,
    comp = 1
  ),
  tibble(
    contrast = contrast_name,
    block = "metabolomics",
    feature_id = selected$metabolomics$name,
    comp = 1
  )
)

result <- list(
  contrast = contrast_name,
  groups = groups_keep,
  metadata = meta_diablo,
  X = X,
  Y = Y,
  top_prot = top_prot,
  top_metab = top_metab,
  tune = tune_diablo,
  model = diablo_final,
  performance = perf_diablo,
  selected_features = selected_tbl,
  final_ncomp = final_ncomp,
  final_keepX = final_keepX
)

saveRDS(
  result,
  file = file.path(out_dir, paste0("diablo_", contrast_name, "_top", top_n, "_abs_t.rds"))
)

readr::write_csv(
  selected_tbl,
  file.path(out_dir, paste0("diablo_selected_features_", contrast_name, ".csv"))
)

return(result)
}
```

```{r}
diablo_results <- purrr::imap(
  contrast_groups,
  ~ run_diablo_contrast(
    contrast_name = .y,
    groups_keep = .x,
    prot_out = prot_out,
    metab_out = metab_out,
    prot_log = prot_log,
    metab_log = metab_log,
    meta_paired = meta_paired,
    top_n = 50,
    ncomp_tune = 2,
    folds = 5,
    nrepeat = 50,
    cutoff = 0.7,
    out_dir = diablo_dir
  )
)

saveRDS(
  diablo_results,
  file = file.path(diablo_dir, "diablo_all_contrasts_top50_abs_t.rds")
)
```
